artPrompt: Twin identical office doorways flanking a vanishing corridor, each opening onto the same mirrored room of stacked carbon-copy forms, the duplication dizzying and recursive. A single rubber stamp hovers mid-strike, casting two overlapping shadows on a blank stapled page, cyan glow doubling along the receding cabinets. Steep one-point perspective rams the viewer down the hall, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Department of Redundancy Department
text: If a triggered ability of a permanent you control would trigger, it triggers an additional time. (Everything must be done twice, and then re-done.)
flavorText: Form 12. Also Form 12-A, which is identical to Form 12 but stapled differently.
